## Fonts

## @font-face Declarations

```css
@font-face { font-display: swap; font-family: "Headspace Apercu"; font-style: normal; font-weight: 400; src: url("https://static.headspace.com/fonts/apercu-v1.002/HeadspaceApercu-Regular.woff2") format("woff2"), url("https://static.headspace.com/fonts/apercu-v1.002/HeadspaceApercu-Regular.woff") format("woff"), url("https://static.headspace.com/fonts/apercu-v1.002/HeadspaceApercu-Regular.ttf") format("truetype"), url("https://static.headspace.com/fonts/apercu-v1.002/HeadspaceApercu-Regular.otf") format("opentype"); }

@font-face { font-display: swap; font-family: "Headspace Apercu"; font-style: italic; font-weight: 400; src: url("https://static.headspace.com/fonts/apercu-v1.002/HeadspaceApercu-Italic.woff2") format("woff2"), url("https://static.headspace.com/fonts/apercu-v1.002/HeadspaceApercu-Italic.woff") format("woff"), url("https://static.headspace.com/fonts/apercu-v1.002/HeadspaceApercu-Italic.ttf") format("truetype"), url("https://static.headspace.com/fonts/apercu-v1.002/HeadspaceApercu-Italic.otf") format("opentype"); }

@font-face { font-display: swap; font-family: "Headspace Apercu"; font-style: normal; font-weight: 600; src: url("https://static.headspace.com/fonts/apercu-v1.002/HeadspaceApercu-Medium.woff2") format("woff2"), url("https://static.headspace.com/fonts/apercu-v1.002/HeadspaceApercu-Medium.woff") format("woff"), url("https://static.headspace.com/fonts/apercu-v1.002/HeadspaceApercu-Medium.ttf") format("truetype"), url("https://static.headspace.com/fonts/apercu-v1.002/HeadspaceApercu-Medium.otf") format("opentype"); }

@font-face { font-display: swap; font-family: "Headspace Apercu"; font-style: italic; font-weight: 600; src: url("https://static.headspace.com/fonts/apercu-v1.002/HeadspaceApercu-MediumItalic.woff2") format("woff2"), url("https://static.headspace.com/fonts/apercu-v1.002/HeadspaceApercu-MediumItalic.woff") format("woff"), url("https://static.headspace.com/fonts/apercu-v1.002/HeadspaceApercu-MediumItalic.ttf") format("truetype"), url("https://static.headspace.com/fonts/apercu-v1.002/HeadspaceApercu-MediumItalic.otf") format("opentype"); }

@font-face { font-display: swap; font-family: "Headspace Apercu"; font-style: italic; font-weight: 200; src: url("https://static.headspace.com/fonts/apercu-v1.002/HeadspaceApercu-LightItalic.woff2") format("woff2"), url("https://static.headspace.com/fonts/apercu-v1.002/HeadspaceApercu-LightItalic.woff") format("woff"), url("https://static.headspace.com/fonts/apercu-v1.002/HeadspaceApercu-LightItalic.ttf") format("truetype"), url("https://static.headspace.com/fonts/apercu-v1.002/HeadspaceApercu-LightItalic.otf") format("opentype"); }

@font-face { font-display: swap; font-family: "Apercu Pro Mono"; font-style: normal; font-weight: 600; src: url("https://static.headspace.com/fonts/apercu/apercu_mono_pro_medium.woff2") format("woff2"), url("https://static.headspace.com/fonts/apercu/apercu_mono_pro_medium.woff") format("woff"), url("https://static.headspace.com/fonts/apercu/apercu_mono_pro_medium.ttf") format("truetype"), url("https://static.headspace.com/fonts/apercu/apercu_mono_pro_medium.otf") format("opentype"); }

@font-face { font-display: swap; font-family: "Apercu Pro Mono"; font-style: normal; font-weight: 400; src: url("https://static.headspace.com/fonts/apercu/apercu_mono_pro_regular.woff2") format("woff2"), url("https://static.headspace.com/fonts/apercu/apercu_mono_pro_regular.woff") format("woff"), url("https://static.headspace.com/fonts/apercu/apercu_mono_pro_regular.ttf") format("truetype"), url("https://static.headspace.com/fonts/apercu/apercu_mono_pro_regular.otf") format("opentype"); }

@font-face { font-display: swap; font-family: apollo-icons; src: url("data:font/woff;base64,") format("woff"), url("data:font/woff2;base64,") format("woff2"); }
```

## Raw rules

```css
default html { line-height: 1.15; text-size-adjust: 100%; }

default body { margin: 0px; }

default main { display: block; }

default h1 { font-size: 2em; margin: 0.67em 0px; }

default hr { box-sizing: content-box; height: 0px; overflow: visible; }

default pre { font-family: monospace, monospace; font-size: 1em; }

default a { background-color: transparent; }

default abbr[title] { border-bottom-width: medium; border-bottom-style: none; border-bottom-color: currentcolor; text-decoration: underline dotted; }

default b, default strong { font-weight: bolder; }

default code, default kbd, default samp { font-family: monospace, monospace; font-size: 1em; }

default small { font-size: 80%; }

default sub, default sup { font-size: 75%; line-height: 0; position: relative; vertical-align: baseline; }

default sub { bottom: -0.25em; }

default sup { top: -0.5em; }

default img { border-style: none; }

default button, default input, default optgroup, default select, default textarea { font-family: inherit; font-size: 100%; line-height: 1.15; margin: 0px; }

default button, default input { overflow: visible; }

default button, default select { text-transform: none; }

default button, default [type="button"], default [type="reset"], default [type="submit"] { appearance: button; }

default fieldset { padding: 0.35em 0.75em 0.625em; }

default legend { box-sizing: border-box; color: inherit; display: table; max-width: 100%; padding: 0px; white-space: normal; }

default progress { vertical-align: baseline; }

default textarea { overflow: auto; }

default [type="checkbox"], default [type="radio"] { box-sizing: border-box; padding: 0px; }

default [type="number"]::-webkit-inner-spin-button, default [type="number"]::-webkit-outer-spin-button { height: auto; }

default [type="search"] { appearance: textfield; outline-offset: -2px; }

default [type="search"]::-webkit-search-decoration { appearance: none; }

default::-webkit-file-upload-button { appearance: button; font: inherit; }

default details { display: block; }

default summary { display: list-item; }

default template { display: none; }

default [hidden] { display: none; }

html, body { font-family: "Headspace Apercu", sans-serif; }

html { line-height: 1.15; text-size-adjust: 100%; }

body { margin: 0px; }

main { display: block; }

h1 { font-size: 2em; margin: 0.67em 0px; }

hr { box-sizing: content-box; height: 0px; overflow: visible; }

pre { font-family: monospace, monospace; font-size: 1em; }

a { background-color: transparent; }

abbr[title] { border-bottom-width: medium; border-bottom-style: none; border-bottom-color: currentcolor; text-decoration: underline dotted; }

b, strong { font-weight: bolder; }

code, kbd, samp { font-family: monospace, monospace; font-size: 1em; }

small { font-size: 80%; }

sub, sup { font-size: 75%; line-height: 0; position: relative; vertical-align: baseline; }

sub { bottom: -0.25em; }

sup { top: -0.5em; }

img { border-style: none; }

button, input, optgroup, select, textarea { font-family: inherit; font-size: 100%; line-height: 1.15; margin: 0px; }

button, input { overflow: visible; }

button, select { text-transform: none; }

button, [type="button"], [type="reset"], [type="submit"] { appearance: button; }

fieldset { padding: 0.35em 0.75em 0.625em; }

legend { box-sizing: border-box; color: inherit; display: table; max-width: 100%; padding: 0px; white-space: normal; }

progress { vertical-align: baseline; }

textarea { overflow: auto; }

[type="checkbox"], [type="radio"] { box-sizing: border-box; padding: 0px; }

[type="number"]::-webkit-inner-spin-button, [type="number"]::-webkit-outer-spin-button { height: auto; }

[type="search"] { appearance: textfield; outline-offset: -2px; }

[type="search"]::-webkit-search-decoration { appearance: none; }

::-webkit-file-upload-button { appearance: button; font: inherit; }

details { display: block; }

summary { display: list-item; }

template { display: none; }

[hidden] { display: none; }

#root { isolation: isolate; }

html { box-sizing: border-box; }

*, ::before, ::after { box-sizing: inherit; }

body { position: relative; color: rgb(45, 44, 43); }

html, body { color: rgb(75, 76, 77); font-size: 16px; margin: 0px; min-height: 100%; overflow-x: hidden; padding: 0px; width: 100%; }

p, button { margin: 0px; }

.zp-modal { outline: 0px; align-items: center; display: flex; justify-content: center; --z-index-legacy-ds2-popover: 20001; }

.zp-modal, .zp-modal-scroll { inset: 0px; position: fixed; z-index: 20000; }

.zp-modal-scroll { overflow-y: auto; }

.zp-modal-scroll:focus { outline: none; }

.zp-modal-center { left: 0px; position: fixed; right: 0px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); z-index: 20000; }

.zp-modal-center:focus { outline: none; }

.zp-modal-content { background-clip: padding-box; background-color: var(--color-ui-background-primary); border-radius: var(--radius-xs); box-shadow: var(--shadow-2); outline: 0px; position: relative; --modal-content-margin-top: 30px; --modal-content-margin-bottom: 30px; margin: var(--modal-content-margin-top) auto var(--modal-content-margin-bottom); }

.zp-modal-content.narrowWidth { min-width: 300px; width: 325px; }

.zp-modal-content.smallWidth { width: 500px; }

.zp-modal-content.mediumWidth { width: 656px; }

.zp-modal-content.wideWidth { width: 900px; }

.zp-modal-content.ultraWideWidth { width: 1200px; }

.zp-modal-content.fullScreenModal { height: 100%; width: 100%; --modal-content-margin-top: 0px; --modal-content-margin-bottom: 0px; display: flex; flex-flow: column; }

.zp-modal-content.sidebar { height: 100%; margin: 0px 0px 0px auto; width: 1000px; }

.zp-modal-content.responsive.narrowWidth { max-width: 325px; width: auto; }

.zp-modal-content.responsive.smallWidth { max-width: 500px; width: auto; }

.zp-modal-content.responsive.mediumWidth { max-width: 656px; width: auto; }

.zp-modal-content.responsive.wideWidth { max-width: 900px; width: auto; }

.zp-modal-content.responsive.ultraWideWidth { max-width: 1200px; width: auto; }

.zp-modal-content.responsive.sidebarWidth { width: 1000px; }

.zp-modal-backdrop { background: var(--color-base-sand-80); inset: 0px; opacity: 0.2; position: fixed; z-index: 19999; }

.zp-modal-header { align-items: center; background-color: var(--color-ui-background-primary); border-top-left-radius: 4px; border-top-right-radius: 4px; display: flex; flex-flow: row; justify-content: space-between; padding: 15px 20px; position: relative; z-index: 1; }

.zp-modal-header .zp-modal-title { color: var(--color-ui-text-base-primary); line-height: 24px; margin: 0px; }

.zp-modal-body { background-color: var(--color-ui-background-primary); color: var(--color-ui-text-base-primary); display: flex; flex: 1 1 0%; flex-flow: column; line-height: 21px; padding: 20px; position: relative; }

.zp-modal-body .zp-modal-body-bleed-h { margin-left: -20px; margin-right: -20px; padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px; }

.zp-modal-body.no-padding { padding: unset; }

.zp-modal-body:first-child { border-top-left-radius: 4px; border-top-right-radius: 4px; }

.zp-modal-body:last-child { border-bottom-left-radius: 4px; border-bottom-right-radius: 4px; }

.zp-modal-footer { align-items: center; background-color: var(--color-ui-background-primary); border-bottom-left-radius: 4px; border-bottom-right-radius: 4px; border-top: 1px solid var(--color-ui-border-default); display: flex; flex-flow: row; padding: 15px 20px; position: relative; z-index: 1; }

.zp-modal-footer .zp-button:first-child:not(:last-child) { margin-right: 10px; }

.modalFooterShiftRight { justify-content: flex-end; }

.secondary .zp-modal-header { background-color: var(--color-ui-background-primary); }

.secondary .zp-modal-header .zp-modal-title { color: var(--color-ui-text-base-primary); }

.secondary :is(.zp-modal-body, .zp-modal-content) { background-color: var(--color-base-sand-10); }

.secondary .zp-modal-footer { background-color: var(--color-ui-background-primary); }

.closeSideDrawer { color: var(--color-ui-text-base-secondary); cursor: pointer; line-height: normal; }

.close, .closeSideDrawer:focus, .closeSideDrawer:hover { color: var(--color-base-sand-60); }

.close { cursor: pointer; line-height: normal; }

.close:active, .close:hover { background-color: var(--color-base-sand-20); border-radius: var(--radius-xxs); }

.close:hover { color: var(--color-base-ocean-50); }

.close:active { color: var(--color-ui-text-base-links); }

.closeTopRight { position: absolute; right: 22px; top: 22px; }

.zp-modal-sidebar { display: none; }

.constrainedWidth { bottom: 0px; flex-direction: column; max-height: calc(100% - 24px); max-width: var(--modal-interactive-max-width,500px); position: absolute; top: unset; width: auto; height: auto !important; }

.clampedModal > div { display: grid; grid-template: "header header" max-content "sidebar body" 1fr "footer footer" max-content / max-content 1fr; justify-items: stretch; max-height: calc(100vh - var(--modal-content-margin-top) - var(--modal-content-margin-bottom)); }

.clampedModal.withSeparateSidebar > div { grid-template: "sidebar header" max-content "sidebar body" 1fr "sidebar footer" max-content / max-content 1fr; }

.clampedModal .zp-modal-header { grid-area: header; }

.clampedModal .zp-modal-sidebar { display: block; grid-area: sidebar; overflow: auto; width: 311px; }

.clampedModal .zp-modal-body { grid-area: body; overflow: auto; }

.clampedModal .zp-modal-footer { grid-area: footer; }

.rrt-confirm-holder { height: 100%; left: 0px; position: fixed; top: 0px; width: 100%; z-index: 99999999; }

.rrt-confirm-holder .shadow { background-color: rgba(50, 58, 68, 0.8); height: 100%; width: 100%; }

.rrt-confirm-holder .rrt-confirm { background-color: var(--color-ui-background-primary); border-radius: var(--radius-xs); box-shadow: 3px 3px 20px var(--color-base-sand-70); left: 50%; margin-left: -160px; overflow: hidden; position: absolute; top: 20%; width: 320px; z-index: 9; }

.rrt-confirm-holder .rrt-confirm .rrt-message { background-color: var(--color-ui-background-primary); clear: both; font-family: var(--system-ui); font-size: 1em; min-height: 50px; padding: 5%; text-align: center; width: 100%; }

.rrt-confirm-holder .rrt-confirm .rrt-buttons-holder { display: flex; }

.rrt-confirm-holder .rrt-confirm .rrt-buttons-holder .rrt-button { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); border-right-width: medium; border-bottom-width: medium; border-left-width: medium; border-right-style: none; border-bottom-style: none; border-left-style: none; border-right-color: currentcolor; border-bottom-color: currentcolor; border-left-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; border-top

.rrt-confirm-holder .rrt-confirm .rrt-buttons-holder .rrt-button:hover { background-color: var(--color-base-sand-10); }

.rrt-confirm-holder .rrt-confirm .rrt-buttons-holder .rrt-button.rrt-ok-btn:active { background-color: var(--color-base-evergreen-50); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); }

.rrt-confirm-holder .rrt-confirm .rrt-buttons-holder .rrt-button.rrt-cancel-btn:active { background-color: var(--color-base-rust-40); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); }

.rrt-confirm-holder .rrt-confirm .rrt-buttons-holder .rrt-button:focus { outline: none; }

body.toastr-confirm-active { overflow: hidden; }

.redux-toastr *, .redux-toastr ::after, .redux-toastr ::before { box-sizing: border-box; }

.redux-toastr :is(.bottom-center, .bottom-left, .bottom-right, .top-center, .top-left, .top-right) { padding: 0px 10px; position: fixed; width: 268px; z-index: 99999999; }

.redux-toastr :is(.top-center, .top-left, .top-right) { top: 15px; }

.redux-toastr :is(.bottom-right, .top-right) { right: 80px; }

.apollo-quill-editor .ql-container .ql-editor { box-sizing: border-box; cursor: text; height: 100%; line-height: 1.42; outline: none; overflow-y: auto; padding: 12px 15px; tab-size: 4; text-align: left; white-space: pre-wrap; overflow-wrap: break-word; }

.apollo-quill-editor .ql-container.ql-disabled .ql-tooltip { visibility: hidden; }

.apollo-quill-editor .ql-container.ql-disabled .ql-editor ul[data-checked] > li::before { pointer-events: none; }

.apollo-quill-editor .ql-clipboard { height: 1px; left: -100000px; overflow-y: hidden; position: absolute; top: 50%; }

.apollo-quill-editor .ql-clipboard p { margin: 0px; padding: 0px; }

.apollo-quill-editor .ql-editor :is(blockquote, h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, ol, p, pre, ul) { counter-reset: list-1 0 list-2 0 list-3 0 list-4 0 list-5 0 list-6 0 list-7 0 list-8 0 list-9 0; }

.apollo-quill-editor .ql-editor :is(ol, ul) { padding-left: 1.5em; }

.apollo-quill-editor .ql-editor :is(ol, ul) > li { list-style-type: none; }

.apollo-quill-editor .ql-editor ul > li::before { content: "•"; }

.apollo-quill-editor .ql-editor :is(ul[data-checked="false"], ul[data-checked="true"]) { pointer-events: none; }

.apollo-quill-editor .ql-editor :is(ul[data-checked="false"], ul[data-checked="true"]) > li::before { color: rgb(119, 119, 119); cursor: pointer; pointer-events: all; }

.apollo-quill-editor .ql-editor ul[data-checked="true"] > li::before { content: "☑"; }

.apollo-quill-editor .ql-editor ul[data-checked="false"] > li::before { content: "☐"; }

.apollo-quill-editor .ql-editor li::before { display: inline-block; margin-right: 0.3em; text-align: right; white-space: nowrap; width: 1.2em; }

.apollo-quill-editor .ql-editor li:not(.ql-direction-rtl)::before { margin-left: -1.5em; }

.apollo-quill-editor .ql-editor :is(ol, ul) li { padding-left: 1.5em; }

.apollo-quill-editor .ql-editor ol li::before { content: counter(list-num) ". "; }

.apollo-quill-editor .ql-editor ol li.ql-indent-1 { counter-increment: list-1 1; counter-reset: list-2 0 list-3 0 list-4 0 list-5 0 list-6 0 list-7 0 list-8 0 list-9 0; }

.apollo-quill-editor .ql-snow .ql-tooltip.ql-editing :is(a.ql-preview, a.ql-remove) { display: none; }

.apollo-quill-editor .ql-snow .ql-tooltip.ql-editing input[type="text"] { display: inline-block; }

.apollo-quill-editor .ql-snow .ql-tooltip.ql-editing a.ql-action::after { border-right: 0px; content: "Save"; padding-right: 0px; }

.apollo-quill-editor .ql-snow .ql-tooltip[data-mode="link"] { display: none; }

.apollo-quill-editor .ql-snow .ql-tooltip[data-mode="formula"]::before { content: "Enter formula:"; }

.apollo-quill-editor .ql-snow .ql-tooltip[data-mode="video"]::before { content: "Enter video:"; }

.apollo-quill-editor .ql-snow a { color: rgb(0, 102, 204); }

.apollo-quill-editor .ql-container.ql-snow { border: 1px solid var(--color-ui-border-default); border-radius: var(--radius-xxs); }

.apollo-quill-editor.quill-editor { position: relative; }

.inboxsdk__compose_statusbarActive .aDj > .aDh, .inboxsdk__size_fixer :is(.aDg, .aDj) { height: auto !important; }

.inboxsdk__appButton { background: var(--color-ui-background-primary); border: 1px solid rgb(218, 220, 224); border-radius: 5em; cursor: pointer; padding: 2px 36px 2px 14px; }

.inboxsdk__appButton:hover { background: rgb(242, 242, 242); }

.inboxsdk__appButton a:hover { text-decoration: none !important; }

.inboxsdk__appButton__clicked, .inboxsdk__appButton__clicked:hover { background: rgb(228, 228, 228); }

.inboxsdk__appButton_title { color: var(--color-ui-text-base-primary); font-family: var(--system-ui); font-size: var(--typeface-body-lg-medium-size); font-weight: var(--typeface-body-lg-medium-weight); letter-spacing: var(--typeface-body-lg-medium-letter-spacing); line-height: var(--typeface-body-lg-medium-line-height); position: relative; }

.inboxsdk__appButton_title::after { border-left: 5px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); border-radius: var(--radius-xxs); border-right: 5px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); border-top: 5px solid rgb(96, 99, 103); bottom: 5px; content: ""; height: 0px; position: absolute; right: -18px; width: 0px; }

:root { --apollo-sidebar-button-size: 40px; --apollo-sidebar-icon-size: 20px; --apollo-sidebar-hover-bg: #0000000a; --apollo-sidebar-focus-bg: #00000014; --apollo-sidebar-hover-opacity: 0.8; --apollo-sidebar-transition: all 0.2s ease; --apollo-sidebar-z-input: 2; --apollo-sidebar-z-icon: 1; }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-button-wrapper { align-items: center; cursor: pointer; display: flex; justify-content: center; position: relative; transition: var(--apollo-sidebar-transition); }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-button-wrapper:hover .apollo-sidebar-button-container { background-color: rgb(242, 242, 242); }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] :is(.apollo-sidebar-button-wrapper:focus, .apollo-sidebar-button-wrapper:focus-within) .apollo-sidebar-button-container { background-color: var(--apollo-sidebar-focus-bg); }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-button-wrapper:focus-visible { outline: none; }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-button-container { align-items: center; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; height: var(--apollo-sidebar-button-size); justify-content: center; min-height: var(--apollo-sidebar-button-size); min-width: var(--apollo-sidebar-button-size); position: relative; transition: var(--apollo-sidebar-transition); width: var(--apollo-sidebar-button-size); }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-input { background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; border-radius: inherit; cursor: pointer; height: 100%; left: 0px; opacity: 0; position: absolute; top: 0px; width: 100%; z-index: var(--apollo-sidebar-z-input); }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-input:focus { box-shadow: none; outline: none; }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-input:hover { box-shadow: none; }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-icon { flex-shrink: 0; height: var(--apollo-sidebar-icon-size); pointer-events: none; transition: var(--apollo-sidebar-transition); width: var(--apollo-sidebar-icon-size); z-index: var(--apollo-sidebar-z-icon); }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-icon[style*="display: none"]::before { content: "⚪"; display: block; font-size: var(--apollo-sidebar-icon-size); line-height: 1; text-align: center; }

[class*="inboxsdk__expando"] { background-position: 4px center !important; }

[class*="zp-message-view-add-to-sequence-icon-"], [class*="zp-message-view-events-icon-"] { height: 0px; width: 0px; }

[id="GmailSidebar"] { height: 100%; }

.expand-iframe { width: 100%; }

.expand-gmail-iframe-container { left: 0px; position: fixed; top: 0px; width: 100vw; z-index: 1000; }

.iframe-body-expanded { margin-left: auto; width: 300px; }

.hubspot-iframe-expanded, .iframe-expanded, .linkedin-iframe-expanded, .salesforce-iframe-expanded { height: 100vh !important; max-height: unset !important; top: 0px !important; width: 100vw !important; }

html.zp-iframe-sidebar-is-aside body.sfdcBody div.s1banner { margin-right: 320px; }

html.zp-iframe-sidebar-is-aside body.desktop .container > .viewport { margin-right: 320px; width: auto; }

html.zp-iframe-sidebar-is-aside body.desktop .container > .viewport header.slds-global-header_container { padding-right: 320px; }

.inboxsdk__compose_notice { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) !important; border-width: medium !important; border-style: none !important; border-color: currentcolor !important; border-image: initial !important; margin: 0px !important; padding: 0px !important; }

body.inboxsdk__gmailv1css .toolbar { border-top: 1px solid var(--color-ui-border-default); }

body:not(.inboxsdk__gmailv1css) .inboxsdk__compose_statusbar { padding-right: 2px; padding-bottom: 4px; padding-left: 2px; margin-bottom: 0px !important; padding-top: 4px !important; }

body:not(.inboxsdk__gmailv1css) table ~ .inboxsdk__compose_statusbar { margin-bottom: 8px !important; }

body:not(.inboxsdk__gmailv1css) table ~ .inboxsdk__compose_statusbar .toolbar { border-bottom: 0px; border-top: 1px solid var(--color-ui-border-default); }

.I5 > .iN > tbody > tr { display: grid; }

:is(.inlineEditWriteHidden:hover, .inlineEditWriteVisible:hover) .zp-mini-toolbar { right: 17px; }

.is-extension .zp-button-group { border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); box-shadow: none; }

.is-extension .zp-button-group > .zp-button, .is-extension .zp-button-group > span > .zp-button { border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); }

.is-extension .zp-button-group > .zp-button:hover, .is-extension .zp-button-group > span > .zp-button:hover { box-shadow: none; }

.is-extension .zp-button-group > span + span:not(:first-child) { border-left: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); }

.is-extension .zp-button { background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom,var(--color-base-sand-10),var(--color-base-sand-10)); border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); box-shadow: none; color: var(--color-ui-text-base-secondary); }

.is-extension .zp-button .zp-icon { color: var(--color-base-sand-60); }

.is-extension .zp-button .zp-icon:hover { color: var(--color-base-sand-70); }

.is-extension .zp-button:hover { color: var(--color-ui-text-base-secondary); border: 1px solid var(--color-ui-border-default) !important; }

.is-extension .zp-button:hover .zp-icon { color: var(--color-base-sand-70); }

body.prevent-external-overrides .zp-modal { z-index: 20000 !important; }

/* === @keyframes === */

@keyframes onetrust-fade-in { 
  0% { opacity: 0; }
  100% { opacity: 1; }
}

@keyframes slide-down-custom { 
  0% { }
  100% { bottom: 0px; }
}

@-webkit-keyframes slide-down-custom { 
  0% { }
  100% { bottom: 0px; }
}

@keyframes x_ux1ny { 
  0% { opacity: 1; }
  100% { opacity: 0; }
}

@keyframes x_hVk6U { 
  0% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  100% { transform: rotate(1turn); }
}

@keyframes x_VaPMP { 
  100% { transform: rotate(1turn); }
}

@keyframes bounceIn { 
  0% { opacity: 0; transform: scale3d(0.3, 0.3, 0.3); }
  20% { transform: scale3d(1.1, 1.1, 1.1); }
  40% { transform: scale3d(0.9, 0.9, 0.9); }
  60% { opacity: 1; transform: scale3d(1.03, 1.03, 1.03); }
  80% { transform: scale3d(0.97, 0.97, 0.97); }
  100% { opacity: 1; transform: scaleX(1); }
}

@keyframes bounceOut { 
  20% { transform: scale3d(0.9, 0.9, 0.9); }
  50%, 55% { opacity: 1; transform: scale3d(1.1, 1.1, 1.1); }
  100% { opacity: 0; transform: scale3d(0.3, 0.3, 0.3); }
}

@keyframes fadeIn { 
  0% { opacity: 0; }
  100% { opacity: 1; }
}

@keyframes fadeOut { 
  0% { opacity: 1; }
  100% { opacity: 0; }
}

@keyframes bounceInDown { 
  0% { opacity: 0; transform: translate3d(0px, -3000px, 0px); }
  60% { opacity: 1; transform: translate3d(0px, 25px, 0px); }
  75% { transform: translate3d(0px, -10px, 0px); }
  90% { transform: translate3d(0px, 5px, 0px); }
  100% { transform: none; }
}

@keyframes bounceOutUp { 
  20% { transform: translate3d(0px, -10px, 0px); }
  40%, 45% { opacity: 1; transform: translate3d(0px, 20px, 0px); }
  100% { opacity: 0; transform: translate3d(0px, -2000px, 0px); }
}

@keyframes x_z27ww { 
  0% { transform: translateX(100%); }
  100% { transform: translateX(0px); }
}

@keyframes x_qUXrh { 
  0% { transform: translateX(0px); }
  100% { transform: translateX(100%); }
}

@keyframes x_edObp { 
  0% { width: 0px; }
  20% { width: 80%; }
  100% { width: 100%; }
}
```
